translation.text: It's raining outside. It rained like this that day too. The last day you smiled. Even though I know I'll never see you again, sometimes I think I hear your voice. They say time heals. That's a lie. You just get used to the pain.

ja: 詩的・感傷的なトーンを日本語でも維持
二人称は文脈に応じて「君」「あなた」を選択
短文の連続でリズムを再現
zh: 保持诗意和感伤的语调
用中文文学表达重现情感
es: Reproducir el ritmo de frases cortas

translation.text: Pour 500ml of water into a pot and heat over medium flame. Once boiling, add 1 teaspoon of salt and cook pasta for 1 minute less than package directions. Meanwhile, sauté garlic in olive oil in a pan, then add red pepper flakes once fragrant.

ja: 料理用語は正確に（medium flame=中火）
計量単位は日本の一般的な表現に
手順の並行性を明確に

translation.text: Descartes' "I think, therefore I am" represents the foundational certainty arrived at through radical skepticism. However, this proposition has faced persistent criticism for presupposing the existence of a thinking subject, thus falling into circular reasoning.

ja: 「我思う、ゆえに我あり」の標準訳を使用
哲学的議論の構造を維持
批判的視点も正確に
zh: 使用「我思故我在」标准译法
ko: '나는 생각한다, 고로 나는 존재한다' 표준 번역

translation.text: Under no circumstances shall the Company be liable for any damages arising from the use of this service. This limitation shall not apply in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence on the part of the Company.

ja: 法律文書の定型表現に変換
「いかなる場合においても」等の法律用語
例外規定も正確に
zh: 转换为中文法律文书用语

translation.text: I've had a dull pain in my lower right abdomen for three days. It was bearable at first, but since yesterday it hurts when I walk. Temperature is 99°F. No appetite. Could this be appendicitis?

ja: 医療用語を正確に（lower right abdomen=右下腹部）
温度はセルシウスに変換（37.2度）
症状の時系列を維持

translation.text: Hey, why is the sky blue? Well, sunlight actually has lots of colors mixed in. You've seen a rainbow, right? All those colors. The tiny particles in the air scatter just the blue light everywhere, so the sky looks blue.

ja: 子供向けの優しい語り口を再現
「ねえ」「〜だよ」等の親しみやすい表現
科学的正確さを保ちつつ分かりやすく
zh: 保持儿童友好的解释方式

translation.text: The proposed pricing does not allow us to maintain profitability, making it difficult to continue our business relationship. Would you consider a 15% price increase? We hope you understand this is necessary to maintain quality.

ja: ビジネス文書として適切な敬語レベルに
交渉のニュアンス（丁寧だが明確な要求）
「ご理解いただければ幸いです」等の表現
zh: 商务用语适当礼貌程度

translation.text: Grandma, congratulations on leaving the hospital! We were so worried. But I'm so happy you're better now. We're all coming to celebrate next week. I'll bring your favorite chestnut sweets, so wait for us!

ja: 家族への温かい語り口
「おばあちゃん」と親しみを込めて
chestnut sweets=栗きんとんまたは栗を使ったお菓子

translation.text: Please don't make me explain the same thing three times. Frankly, I'm tired of being asked things that are clearly in the manual. I have other work too. Please make some effort to look things up yourself.

ja: 不満・苛立ちの度合いを適切に
直接的だが罵倒ではない
職場での正当な不満という文脈

translation.text: I have no words for this sudden loss. Your father was so kind to me since my student days. His stern yet warm character is the foundation of who I am today. My deepest condolences.

ja: 弔意の表現を日本語の慣習に
「ご冥福をお祈り申し上げます」等の定型表現
故人への敬意と感謝
zh: 吊唁表达符合中文习惯

translation.text: My cat steps on my face every morning at 5am to wake me up, then goes right back to sleep after I feed her. So basically I'm a high-performance automatic feeder? I'm starting to think I'm employed by my cat. Payment is in paw pad touches.

ja: ユーモア・自虐ネタを維持
猫飼い主あるあるの共感
「肉球」は日本語で通じる表現
es: Experiencia común de dueños de gatos

translation.text: Through the alley, there was an old shopping street where time seemed to have stopped. Faded signs, laundry hanging from eaves, children playing in front of a candy store. The true face of this town, unlisted in any guidebook, was right there.

ja: 文学的・描写的な文体を維持
日本の「下町」的イメージに変換可能
視覚的情景を大切に

translation.text: I couldn't say this for so long, but I like you. Being just friends has become painful. I'm sorry if this bothers you. But I couldn't keep hiding my feelings anymore. Take your time to respond.

ja: 告白の緊張感と誠実さ
「好きです」の直接的な告白
相手への配慮も表現

translation.text: Three minutes of stoppage time! Racing up the left side! Cross! Header! GOOOAAAL! Equalizer! Unbelievable! Applause for the players who never gave up! The whole stadium is shaking! This is football!

ja: スポーツ実況の興奮を再現
短文・感嘆符で臨場感
「これがサッカーだ！」の定型表現
zh: 短句感叹号营造现场感

translation.text: Individual efforts alone have limits in reducing plastic. Companies must stop excessive packaging, governments must build infrastructure, and consumers must show intent through choices. Without all three working together, a sustainable society remains a pipe dream.

ja: 社会問題への論理的な意見
「絵に描いた餅」に相当する表現
三者の役割を明確に

translation.text: >be me >finally update the DB after procrastinating for 3 weeks >accidentally nuke prod >backup? never heard of her >boss walks in >"why is everything on fire" >fired.jpg lmao

ja: 4chan greentext形式を2ch風に変換
「>俺氏」「草」等のネットスラング
IT失敗談あるある
zh: 转换为中文网络文化风格
es: Adaptar a cultura de internet hispanohablante

casual.formal: I would appreciate it if you could confirm.
I apologize for taking your time when you are busy, but could I have a moment?
I apologize for the trouble, but please handle this.
casual.adjusted: Sorry but can you take care of this?

casual.formal: Please feel free to ask if you have any questions.
casual.adjusted: Hit me up if you have questions

casual.formal: It has been a long time. How have you been?
casual.adjusted: Long time no see! How've you been?

casual.formal: Accordingly, I inform you as follows.
I apologize for bothering you when you're busy, but please confirm.
casual.adjusted: Sorry to bug you, but check this out!

casual.formal: I look forward to our continued relationship.

polite.adjusted: Would you mind taking a look at this?
I would greatly appreciate if you could handle this matter.
I'm afraid I don't quite understand.
I regret to inform you that this would not be possible.
I shall attend to this matter shortly.
May I ask who I have the pleasure of speaking with?
I beg your pardon, could you please elaborate?
Certainly, it would be my pleasure.
I'm afraid I must respectfully decline.
Would you be so kind as to wait a moment?
I'm afraid I'm not aware of that.
I apologize, but would you mind repeating that?
I would be most grateful if this could be expedited.

neutral.formal: This is seriously messed up!!! What do I do!?
neutral.adjusted: There's an issue. Please advise on the solution.

neutral.formal: Dear Sir/Madam, I hope this letter finds you in excellent health and spirits.

concise.formal: I apologize for bothering you when you're busy, but I would appreciate if you could confirm.
If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
Thank you very much for your consideration.
I apologize for the urgency, but could you please handle this immediately?
I deeply apologize for the trouble.
If there are any unclear points, please let me know.
I look forward to our continued relationship.
Thank you for your time despite your busy schedule.
Accordingly, please refer to the attached documents.
Could you please let me know a convenient date and time?
If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to ask.
I apologize for bothering you when you're busy, but I would appreciate a reply.
I will contact you again regarding the details.

detailed.adjusted: Please review the attached document for accuracy, currency of information, and format consistency. Flag any issues you find.
Please correct the flagged items. After corrections, document the changes with before/after comparisons and submit for re-review.
Please provide a report including: current status, completed items, pending items and reasons, upcoming schedule, risks or issues, and support needed.
Please explain in this order: background, objective, methodology, results, and discussion. Add supplementary notes for technical terms and reference figures where applicable.
Please send following these guidelines: verify recipients, include project name in subject, add summary in body, attach files in PDF format, request read receipt after sending.

Please investigate covering: current state assessment, problem identification, root cause analysis, similar case research, solution exploration, and feasibility evaluation. Compile findings in a report.
Please structure as: 1.Overview, 2.Background, 3.Objective, 4.Methods, 5.Results, 6.Discussion, 7.Conclusion, 8.Future work. Keep each section concise with clear key points.
Let me share the consultation topic with: background info, current situation, options considered, pros and cons of each, and specific points I'd like your input on.
Please explain: basic concepts, specific procedures, common mistakes and cautions, reference materials or links, and any practical advice you might have.
I need support with: detailed task description, expected deliverables, deadline, tools and environment to use. Please ask if anything is unclear.
Please share your schedule including: date/time options (multiple), estimated duration, location or video call URL, attendees, agenda, and any preparation needed.
Please prepare an estimate with: work breakdown, unit price and quantity per item, subtotal, tax, total, validity period, payment terms, and notes.
Issue report: occurrence date/time, situation description, scope of impact, current response status, hypothesized cause, resolution plan, and support needed.
Proposal: background, current challenges, detailed proposal, expected benefits, required resources and costs, implementation timeline, and risks with mitigation plans.
Please provide feedback on: positive aspects, areas needing improvement, specific improvement suggestions, priority items, and any other observations.
Completion report: work performed, completion date/time, deliverable location, points to verify, notes, and any follow-up items or next steps.

catchy.adjusted: The wait is OVER - Introducing our game-changer!
Limited time only! Don't miss this epic deal
BREAKING: News you can't afford to miss
Exclusive intel for those in the know
We NEED you! Join the dream team
Level up! Fresh update just dropped
History in the making - The event of the century begins
Price so low it's almost illegal
ALERT: Almost gone! Last chance warning...
Now or never - This won't last forever
Your wish = granted. Game-changing feature unlocked
STOP SCROLLING - You need to see this
FREE STUFF ALERT - Grab it while it lasts!
THANK YOU! You made this happen - SOLD OUT

natural.formal: I am very pleased to have the opportunity to meet you.
I would be most grateful if you could consider this matter.
natural.adjusted: I'd appreciate if you could think about it.

natural.formal: I thank you for the time you have given me.
I deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused.
Should you have any inquiries, please do not hesitate to contact us.
natural.adjusted: Feel free to ask if you have questions.

natural.formal: I am not in possession of information regarding that matter.
Please visit at your earliest convenience.
The weather is quite pleasant today, is it not?
I would be grateful if you could share your thoughts.
I apologize for the inconvenience, but thank you for your cooperation.
natural.adjusted: Sorry for the hassle, and thanks.

natural.formal: Our company intends to give this matter positive consideration.
We hope for your continued patronage.
We ask for your kind understanding.
I know you are busy, but thank you for your time.
We are deeply grateful for your continued support.

natural.adjusted: Take a look when you can.

less-ai.formal: Should you have any inquiries, please do not hesitate to reach out.
Please let me know if there's anything I can assist you with.
I will take it under consideration.
I hope to be of assistance.
Please inform me if anything arises.
less-ai.adjusted: Let me know if anything comes up.
